scripts.postinstall: npm run sync:material-icons && npm run sync:pwa-icons
scripts.predev: npm run sync:material-icons && npm run sync:pwa-icons
scripts.server:daemonize: sh -c 'if [ -f /tmp/codex-monitor-web.pid ] && kill -0 "$(cat /tmp/codex-monitor-web.pid)" 2>/dev/null; then echo "codex-monitor-web already running as PID $(cat /tmp/codex-monitor-web.pid)"; exit 0; fi; nohup env CODEX_MONITOR_WEB_HOST="${CODEX_MONITOR_WEB_HOST:-0.0.0.0}" npm run server:dev > /tmp/codex-monitor-web.log 2>&1 < /dev/null & echo $! > /tmp/codex-monitor-web.pid; echo "started codex-monitor-web as PID $(cat /tmp/codex-monitor-web.pid)"'
scripts.server:stop: sh -c 'if [ ! -f /tmp/codex-monitor-web.pid ]; then echo "codex-monitor-web is not running"; exit 0; fi; pid=$(cat /tmp/codex-monitor-web.pid); if kill -0 "$pid" 2>/dev/null; then kill "$pid" && echo "stopped codex-monitor-web (PID $pid)"; else echo "removing stale pid file for PID $pid"; fi; rm -f /tmp/codex-monitor-web.pid'
scripts.server:status: sh -c 'if [ -f /tmp/codex-monitor-web.pid ] && kill -0 "$(cat /tmp/codex-monitor-web.pid)" 2>/dev/null; then echo "codex-monitor-web running as PID $(cat /tmp/codex-monitor-web.pid)"; exit 0; fi; echo "codex-monitor-web is not running"; exit 1'
scripts.prebuild: npm run sync:material-icons && npm run sync:pwa-icons
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && vite build && npm run build:server
scripts.codemod:ds:dry: npm run codemod:modal-shell -- --dry-run && npm run codemod:panel-shell -- --dry-run && npm run codemod:toast-shell -- --dry-run
scripts.codemod:ds: npm run codemod:modal-shell && npm run codemod:panel-shell && npm run codemod:toast-shell
scripts.tauri:dev:win: npm run doctor:win && tauri dev --config src-tauri/tauri.windows.conf.json
scripts.tauri:build:win: npm run doctor:win && tauri build --config src-tauri/tauri.windows.conf.json
